scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n TAILWIND,CLJS "npm run css:watch" "npm run cljs:watch"
scripts.build: npm run css:build && npx shadow-cljs release app portfolio-worker
scripts.test: npm run test:runner:generate && shadow-cljs compile test && node out/test.js
scripts.coverage: npm run test:runner:generate && rm -rf .coverage coverage && shadow-cljs compile test && shadow-cljs compile ws-test && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=.coverage node out/test.js && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=.coverage node out/ws-test.js && c8 report --temp-directory .coverage
scripts.coverage:ci: npm run coverage && npm run coverage:check
scripts.check: npm run test:runner:generate && npm run lint:test && npm run lint:hiccup && npm run lint:docs && npm run lint:docs:test && npx shadow-cljs compile app && npx shadow-cljs compile portfolio-worker && npx shadow-cljs compile test
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:runner:generate && shadow-cljs watch test
scripts.test:repl: npm run test:runner:generate && shadow-cljs cljs-repl test
